entries.title: Capability list or prompt surface where provided by a consuming package.
entries.notes: Optional because this package registers services and actions but no standalone Filament UI. Capture only through a consuming package that renders registered `AIOrchestratorCapabilityData` entries.
entries.useCase: A developer verifies that installed AI Orchestrator modules expose the expected capability labels and approval levels.

entries.title: LayoutBuilder layout preview workflow if LayoutBuilder integration is enabled.
entries.notes: Optional and blocked until a Layout Builder consuming UI exposes `LayoutBuilderAIOrchestratorModule`; this package only provides the integration module and preview action.
entries.useCase: An editor previews an AI-generated Layout Builder plan before any layout content is applied.

entries.title: Approval state where a capability requires review.
entries.notes: Optional and requires a consuming package that persists or displays review-required capability runs. AI Orchestrator itself keeps run state in data objects.
entries.useCase: A reviewer sees that an AI capability result needs human approval before the consuming package acts on it.
